events.text: Goal! Scotland 0, Brazil 1. Vinícius Júnior (Brazil) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Rayan.
Substitution, Scotland. Kieran Tierney replaces Andy Robertson because of an injury.
Goal! Scotland 0, Brazil 2. Vinícius Júnior (Brazil) header from very close range to the top left corner. Assisted by Bruno Guimarães with a cross.
Goal! Scotland 0, Brazil 3. Matheus Cunha (Brazil) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Bruno Guimarães.
Danilo (Brazil) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Brazil. Gabriel Martinelli replaces Lucas Paquetá.
Substitution, Brazil. Neymar replaces Matheus Cunha.
Substitution, Scotland. Anthony Ralston replaces Nathan Patterson.
Substitution, Brazil. Alex Sandro replaces Douglas Santos.
Substitution, Scotland. Ryan Christie replaces Ben Gannon-Doak.
Fabinho (Brazil) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Ryan Christie (Scotland) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Scotland. Findlay Curtis replaces John McGinn.
Substitution, Scotland. Ché Adams replaces Lawrence Shankland.
